subTitle.v: Cập nhật thông tin tính giá thành: thêm, sửa, xóa...
subTitle.e: Add, Edit, Delete Costing Calculation Parameters...

action.text:
if charindex('''', rtrim(@ky) + rtrim(@nam)) > 0 return declare @q nvarchar(4000), @d1 smalldatetime, @d2 smalldatetime, @m_gia_vt tinyint, @m_gia_tb_nt tinyint, @fifoType tinyint, @user nvarchar(128), @ngay datetime select @d1 = dbo.ff_getstartdateofcycle(@ky, @nam), @d2 = dbo.ff_getenddateofcycle(@ky, @nam), @ngay = getdate(), @q = '' select @m_gia_vt = cast(rtrim(val) as tinyint) from options where name = 'm_gia_vt' select @m_gia_tb_nt = cast(rtrim(val) as tinyint) from options where name = 'm_gia_tb_nt' select @fifoType = cast(rtrim(val) as tinyint) from options where name = 'm_gia_ntxt'
select top 1 @q = 'exec ' + replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace( replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(rtrim(b.stored) + ' ' + rtrim(b.para), '$dFrom', '''' + convert(char(8), @d1, 112) + ''''), '$dTo', '''' + convert(char(8), @d2, 112) + ''''), '$ky', rtrim(@ky)), '$nam', rtrim(@nam)), '$m_gia_vt', rtrim(@m_gia_vt)), '$m_gia_tb_nt', rtrim(@m_gia_tb_nt)), '$userid', rtrim(@@userID)), '$admin', rtrim(@@admin)), '$ma_dvcs', '''' + replace(rtrim(ma_dvcs), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$ma_gd', '''' + replace(rtrim(ma_gd), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$ma_bp', '''' + replace(rtrim(ma_bp), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$loai_yt', '''' + replace(rtrim(loai_yt), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$ma_yt', '''' + replace(rtrim(ma_yt), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$ma_kho', '''' + replace(rtrim(ma_kho), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$nhom_kho', '''' + replace(rtrim(nhom_kho), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$loai_vt', '''' + replace(rtrim(loai_vt), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$nh_vt1', '''' + replace(rtrim(nh_vt1), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$nh_vt2', '''' + replace(rtrim(nh_vt2), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$nh_vt3', '''' + replace(rtrim(nh_vt3), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$tk_cl', '''' + replace(rtrim(tk_cl), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$tao_pxcl', '''' + replace(rtrim(tao_pxcl), '''', '''''') + ''''), '$m_gia_ntxt', rtrim(@fifoType)) from xdmtgt a join xdmgt b on a.id = b.id where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec exec sp_executesql @q
if not exists (select 1 from xcttgt where ky = @ky and nam = @nam and stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin insert into xcttgt (ky, nam, stt_rec, status, user_id0, user_id2, datetime0, datetime2) select @ky, @nam, @stt_rec, '2', @@userID, @@userID, @ngay, @ngay end else begin update xcttgt set status = '2', user_id2 = @@userID, datetime2 = @ngay where ky = @ky and nam = @nam and stt_rec = @stt_rec end select @user = rtrim(comment) from vsysuserinfo where id = @@userID select @step + 1 as c, @user as c2, @ngay as c3 return

declare @count int, @i int, @stt_rec char(13) select @count = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$GetWordCount (@s, ',') select @i = 1
while @i <= @count begin select @stt_rec = dbo.[FastBusiness$Function$GetWordNum](@s, @i, ',') delete xcttgt where ky = @ky and nam = @nam and stt_rec = @stt_rec and status = '1' and user_id2 is null update xcttgt set status = '3' where ky = @ky and nam = @nam and stt_rec = @stt_rec and status = '1' select @i = @i +1 end select 0 as error return

query.text:
declare @unitKey varchar(4000), @join varchar(4000), @field nvarchar(4000), @v char(1) select @v = case when @@language = 'V' then '' else '2' end select case when @@language = 'V' then N'Đặt lịch' else N'Schedule' end as trang_thai into #t
if exists (select 1 from options where name = 'm_gt_dvcs' and val = '1') begin set @unitKey = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$GetUnitFilterEx('ma_dvcs', replace(rtrim(@ma_dvcs), '''', ''''''), @@userID, @@admin, 'New') set @unitKey = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$GetCheckKey(@unitKey) end if @unitKey is null set @unitKey = ''
select @field = 'rtrim(a.stt_rec) as stt_rec, &Tag;, rtrim(a.ma_dvcs), a.buoc_tinh, rtrim(stored_name%l) as stored_name' + @v select @field = @field + ', case when e.status = ''1'' then h.trang_thai else N'''' end as tinh_trang' + @v select @field = @field + ', rtrim(g.comment' + @v + ') as nguoi_tinh, e.datetime2 as ngay, str(a.buoc_tinh, 9) as buoc_tinh2'
select @join = 'left join (select b.stt_rec, c.ky, c.nam, c.status, c.user_id2, c.datetime2 from dbo.xdmtgt as b left join xcttgt as c on b.stt_rec = c.stt_rec' select @join = @join + char(13) + ' where c.id = (select max(id) from xcttgt d where b.stt_rec = d.stt_rec and ky = ' + rtrim(@ky) + ' and nam =' + rtrim(@nam) + ')' select @join = @join + char(13) + ' ) e on a.stt_rec = e.stt_rec' select @join = @join + char(13) + 'left join xdmgt f on a.id = f.id' select @join = @join + char(13) + 'left join @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo g on e.user_id2 = g.id, #t h' &FilterInitialize; exec FastBusiness$App$Table$Finding @@table, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @unitKey, 'rtrim(ma_dvcs) + str(buoc_tinh, 9) + a.stt_rec', @field, @join, @@textOrderBy, @@admin, @@userID, default, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
